name: Auto-Validate Security Rules
description: Validate that all always-on security steering files are present and correctly configured on Kiro startup

then.prompt:
On startup, verify that the following always-on security steering files exist in the .kiro/steering/ directory:

1. secrets-management.md
2. supply-chain-security.md
3. authentication-standards.md
4. logging-standards.md

For each file found, verify the frontmatter contains 'inclusion: always'.

If any file is missing or has incorrect frontmatter, report it to the user and suggest re-running: `kiro-security-check update` or `./install.sh`.

If all files are present and valid, do nothing.
